blended.narrative: Sleeping Giant is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 5,080 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 9 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Friday: 2.0" of snow, highs of 40°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 4.0" of new snow over the past week. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 46".
